languages.text: "Мирянин, постарайся в меру своих способностей описать какими именно ксеносскими технологиями судно было осквернено. Любые спецификации изрядно помогли бы делу Познания и очищению корабля. Нунциус, не упусти ничего и постарайся избежать излишних вольностей в трактовках".

"Layperson, within the limited scope of your abilities, describe precisely which xenos technologies have defiled this vessel. Any specifics would greatly serve the Quest for Knowledge and the vessel's purification. Nuncius, record all of this, omit nothing, and strive to avoid excessive liberties in your interpretations."
languages.original_text: "Мирянин, постарайся в меру своих способностей описать какими именно ксеносскими технологиями судно было осквернено. Любые спецификации изрядно помогли бы делу Познания и очищению корабля. Нунциус, не упусти ничего и постарайся избежать излишних вольностей в трактовках".

traits.locale_text: "Layman, within the limited scope of your abilities, attempt to describe precisely which xenos technologies have defiled this vessel. Any specifications would greatly serve the cause of Knowledge and the vessel's purification. Nuntius, omit nothing, and strive to avoid excessive liberties in your interpretations."

languages.text: "Nichtfachperson, bitte beschreibt im Rahmen Eurer begrenzten Fähigkeiten präzise, welche Xenos-Technologien dieses Schiff entweihen. Jedes Detail wäre der Suche nach Wissen und der Reinigung des Schiffes ausgesprochen dienlich. Nuncius, zeichnet all das hier auf, lasst nichts aus und erlaubt Euch hinsichtlich Eurer Interpretationen keine allzu großen Freiheiten."
languages.original_text: "Layperson, within the limited scope of your abilities, describe precisely which xenos technologies have defiled this vessel. Any specifics would greatly serve the Quest for Knowledge and the vessel's purification. Nuncius, record all of this, omit nothing, and strive to avoid excessive liberties in your interpretations."

Nuncius, zeichnet all das hier auf, lasst nichts aus und erlaubt Euch hinsichtlich Eurer Interpretationen keine allzu großen Freiheiten."

languages.text: “教外人士，在你那有限的能力范围内，尽可能准确地描述，这艘舰船究竟被哪些异形技术玷污了。任何细节都将对求知远征和舰船净化大有助力。努恩修斯，记录下这一切，一个字都别漏，尽量避免过度解读。”
languages.original_text: "Layperson, within the limited scope of your abilities, describe precisely which xenos technologies have defiled this vessel. Any specifics would greatly serve the Quest for Knowledge and the vessel's purification. Nuncius, record all of this, omit nothing, and strive to avoid excessive liberties in your interpretations."

traits.locale_text: “教外人士，在你那有限的能力范围内，尽可能准确地描述，这艘舰船究竟被哪些异形技术玷污了。任何细节都将对求知远征和舰船净化大有助力。努恩修斯，记录下这一切，一个字都别漏，尽量避免过度解读。”

languages.text: « Profane, je vous prie de décrire, au mieux de vos capacités limitées, les technologies xénos exactes qui ont souillé ce vaisseau. Tous les détails que vous pourrez nous fournir nous aideront à avancer dans la Quête de la Connaissance et à le purifier. Nuncius, enregistre tout sans rien omettre et tâche de ne pas interpréter trop librement ces informations. »
languages.original_text: "Layperson, within the limited scope of your abilities, describe precisely which xenos technologies have defiled this vessel. Any specifics would greatly serve the Quest for Knowledge and the vessel's purification. Nuncius, record all of this, omit nothing, and strive to avoid excessive liberties in your interpretations."

traits.locale_text: « Profane, je vous prie de décrire, au mieux de vos capacités limitées, les technologies xénos exactes qui ont souillé ce vaisseau. Tous les détails que vous pourrez nous fournir nous aideront à avancer dans la Quête de la Connaissance et à le purifier. Nuncius, enregistre tout sans rien omettre et tâche de ne pas interpréter trop librement ces informations. »

languages.text: «Seglar, describe con la precisión que te permitan tus limitadas facultades qué tecnologías xenos han profanado esta nave. Todo detalle que puedas aportar contribuirá en gran medida a la búsqueda del conocimiento y a la purificación de este navío. Nuncius, toma nota de todo esto, no omitas nada, y procura no tomarte demasiadas libertades en tus interpretaciones».
languages.original_text: "Layperson, within the limited scope of your abilities, describe precisely which xenos technologies have defiled this vessel. Any specifics would greatly serve the Quest for Knowledge and the vessel's purification. Nuncius, record all of this, omit nothing, and strive to avoid excessive liberties in your interpretations."

traits.locale_text: «Seglar, describe con la precisión que te permitan tus limitadas facultades qué tecnologías xenos han profanado esta nave. Todo detalle que puedas aportar contribuirá en gran medida a la búsqueda del conocimiento y a la purificación de este navío. Nuncius, toma nota de todo esto, no omitas nada, y procura no tomarte demasiadas libertades en tus interpretaciones».

languages.text: "Avam... Kabiliyetlerinin sınırlı kapsamı dâhilinde, tam olarak hangi zeno teknolojilerinin bu gemiyi kirlettiğini açıkla. En ufak bir ayrıntı, İrfan Arayışı'na ve geminin arındırılmasına büyük hizmette bulunacaktır. Nuncius, bunların hepsini kaydet. Hiçbir şeyi atlama ve yorumlarında aşırı serbestlikten kaçınmaya çalış."
languages.original_text: "Layperson, within the limited scope of your abilities, describe precisely which xenos technologies have defiled this vessel. Any specifics would greatly serve the Quest for Knowledge and the vessel's purification. Nuncius, record all of this, omit nothing, and strive to avoid excessive liberties in your interpretations."

traits.locale_text: "Avam... Kabiliyetlerinin sınırlı kapsamı dâhilinde, tam olarak hangi zeno teknolojilerinin bu gemiyi kirlettiğini açıkla. Hiçbir şeyi atlama ve yorumlarında aşırı serbestlikten kaçınmaya çalış."

languages.text: 「世俗の者よ、あなたの限られた能力の範囲内で、どの異種族技術がこの艦を汚したのかを正確に述べなさい。いかなる詳細も、知識の探求と艦の浄化に大いに資するでしょう。ヌンキウス、これをすべて記録し、何一つ漏らさず、解釈に過度な自由を持ち込まぬよう努めなさい」
languages.original_text: "Layperson, within the limited scope of your abilities, describe precisely which xenos technologies have defiled this vessel. Any specifics would greatly serve the Quest for Knowledge and the vessel's purification. Nuncius, record all of this, omit nothing, and strive to avoid excessive liberties in your interpretations."

traits.locale_text: 「世俗の者よ、あなたの限られた能力の範囲内で、どの異種族技術がこの艦を汚したのかを正確に述べなさい。いかなる詳細も、知識の探求と艦の浄化に大いに資するでしょう。ヌンキウス、これをすべて記録し、何一つ漏らさず、解釈に過度な自由を持ち込まぬよう努めなさい」
